title: Mellow Ukrainian Walnuts Crumble
description: A funky, crumbly comfort dessert featuring low-glycemic condensed milk and a chilled walnut topping.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180C and line a 20cm square baking dish with parchment.
Toast walnuts in a dry skillet until fragrant and set aside to cool.
In a bowl, combine oat flour, cold butter, erythritol, salt, and vanilla, and mix until crumbly.
Add the low-glycemic condensed milk to the crumb mixture and stir until the topping is moist but not sticky.
Fold in the toasted walnuts and pour the mixture into the prepared dish, spreading evenly.
Place the dish in an ice bath with 30ml ice water for 10 minutes to chill the topping before baking.
Bake for 15 minutes until the edges are golden and the center is set.
Remove from oven, let cool 5 minutes, then serve warm or chilled.
